message:
feat(pages,search): key management private-artifact tests and FTS5 transpiler fix for dotted-hyphenated terms

Two independent improvements from concurrent agent work:

Key Management Tests (key_management.rs):
- test_key_add_password_updates_private_fingerprint_and_master_key: verifies
  that adding a password key rotates both the integrity fingerprint and the
  master key JSON in the private directory
- test_key_add_recovery_writes_private_recovery_artifact: verifies the recovery
  secret is written to private/recovery-secret.txt
- test_key_revoke_recovery_removes_private_recovery_artifact: verifies revoking
  a recovery slot cleans up the private recovery file
- test_key_rotate_refreshes_private_recovery_and_master_key: verifies full
  rotation updates both master key and recovery artifacts

FTS5 Transpiler Fix (query.rs):
- Extracted render_fts5_term_part() helper that handles hyphen quoting per
  sub-term after sanitization splits on dots (e.g., "br-123.jsonl" →
  ("br-123" AND jsonl)). Previously, the unsupported-wildcard check and
  hyphen quoting only applied to the whole term, not to individual sub-parts
  after dot-splitting, causing dotted-hyphenated terms to produce invalid FTS5
- New tests: transpile_to_fts5_quotes_hyphenated_subterms_after_sanitization_split,
  plus integration tests for "br-123.jsonl" and "br-123.json*" prefix queries

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
